name: Absolute
description: Endpoint security and persistence platform. Monitor device inventory, applications, and security compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Absolute console
2. Go to Settings > API Token Management
3. Create a new API token
4. Copy the Token ID and Secret Key (secret is shown only once)
5. Determine your API Base URL based on your region:
   - US Commercial: https://api.absolute.com
   - US Federal: https://api.us.absolute.com
   - EU: https://api.eu.absolute.com
6. Enter all values below

credentialFields.label: Token ID
credentialFields.helpText: API Token ID from the Absolute Console. Go to Settings > API Token Management to create one.

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: The Secret Key paired with your Token ID. Shown only once at creation.

credentialFields.label: API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Absolute API base URL. US: https://api.absolute.com, US Federal: https://api.us.absolute.com, EU: https://api.eu.absolute.com

checks.name: Device Inventory
checks.description: Monitor enrolled endpoint devices and their security status

checks.name: Application Inventory
checks.description: Monitor installed applications across managed devices
